title: PackExecution
description: Runtime request to apply a ClusterPack to a target cluster. The reconciler performs a 4-gate check before submitting a pack-deploy Job via Kueue. One PackExecution per ClusterPack per target cluster deployment attempt. wrapper-schema.md §3.

version.description: Expected version of the ClusterPack. Guards against race conditions where the name is reused with a different version.

targetClusterRef.description: Name of the TalosCluster CR that is the deployment target. The cluster must be Ready before the pack-deploy Job will be admitted.

admissionProfileRef.description: Name of the RBACProfile that governs this execution. The 4-gate check verifies this profile has reached provisioned=true.

chartVersion.description: Version of the Helm chart being deployed. Copied from the referenced ClusterPack at execution time. Absent for kustomize and raw category packs. Decision B.

chartURL.description: URL of the Helm chart repository. Copied from the referenced ClusterPack at execution time. Absent for kustomize and raw category packs. Decision B.

chartName.description: Name of the Helm chart being deployed. Copied from the referenced ClusterPack at execution time. Absent for kustomize and raw category packs. Decision B.

helmVersion.description: Version of the Helm SDK used to render the ClusterPack. Copied from the referenced ClusterPack at execution time. Ensures rendering reproducibility. Absent for kustomize and raw category packs. Decision B.

lineage.description: Sealed causal chain record. Authored once at object creation and immutable thereafter. seam-core-schema.md §5, CLAUDE.md Decision 1.

status.description: PackExecution runtime status. Written exclusively by the PackExecutionReconciler.

jobName.description: Name of the pack-deploy Kueue Job that was submitted. Present after Job submission.

operationResultRef.description: Name of the PackOperationResult written by the Conductor executor after successful pack-deploy Job completion.

conditions.description: Standard Kubernetes condition list for this PackExecution.
